title: Application - Update from previous app version while using guest account (TBD)
scenario: Update app from previous version while signed in as a guest account
steps: Launch the app using a guest account.
Ensure the app is on a previous version (not the latest).
Trigger an update to the latest app version (e.g., via app store or in-app update prompt).
Complete the update process and relaunch the app.
expected: The app updates successfully and the guest account session/data is preserved after the update.
